reviews.name: Sandra
reviews.text: The care was completely detailed and everything was explained thoroughly.

reviews.name: Brenda
reviews.text: I loved the care, precise and objective. Thank you very much.

reviews.name: Yoana
reviews.text: Excellent care, super detailed and patient with all our questions.

reviews.name: Ivonne
reviews.text: She is a very well-prepared and attentive doctor, she dedicates enough time for proper diagnosis and improvement.

reviews.name: Santiago
reviews.text: Very professional, objective and empathetic doctor with a strong sense of responsibility and punctuality. Warm care and highly expert in her field.

reviews.name: Itzel
reviews.text: Being the first visit, there were many detailed questions about daily life, school, general behavior, history of other types of therapies and family background. She ran some tests on my son and gave us documentation about the findings, fully understanding the school pressure we had around the diagnosis, so she provided us information to present to the school. During the session she was very kind, attentive, empathetic and professional. My son was calm the whole time and she has some really fun games.
